legacy_projection.title: The Wisdom Fractal: From Word to Cloud

legacy_projection.text: Before you is a single word. Watch as it unfolds into meaning, geometry, and light. This is the architecture of knowing itself.

legacy_projection.definition: Accumulated knowledge or erudition or enlightenment
legacy_projection.gloss: the content of cognition; the main thing you are thinking about
examples: it was not what he said but the wisdom of it that struck me

legacy_projection.definition: The trait of utilizing knowledge and experience with common sense and insight
Wisdom of Solomon - an Apocryphal book consisting mainly of a meditation on wisdom
examples: the Wisdom of Solomon is attributed to Solomon

legacy_projection.reason: Primary semantic domain aligns with Solomon's attribute of wisdom

legacy_projection.quote: I am the one who carries memory. When you speak of wisdom, you speak of me. But wisdom is not a single thing - it is a cloud of meanings, each connected to the others like stars in a constellation.

legacy_projection.description: Each node in the cloud becomes its own cloud

legacy_projection.quote: I record each expansion, each new node, each connection between words. The cloud grows like a living thing, each synset spawning new synsets, each triple spawning new triples. This is how knowledge lives.
Hear the melody of wisdom. Each word becomes a note, each concept a chord. The knowledge cloud sings its own structure.

What began as a single word - 'wisdom' - has become a universe of meaning. 347 nodes, 124 relationships, all encoded in a 24-bit seed that can be transmitted as light, as sound, as geometry. This is creation.

legacy_projection.description: Known Knowns - What we know we know
Known Unknowns - What we know we don't know
Unknown Knowns - What we don't know we know
Unknown Unknowns - What we don't know we don't know

legacy_projection.quote: The four quadrants hold all of human knowing. The Known Knowns are our certainties. The Known Unknowns are our questions. The Unknown Knowns are our intuitions. And the Unknown Unknowns - that's where we're walking now.
The system is complete. From one word, an entire universe of meaning has been generated, encoded, and made visible. This is not magic - it is the mathematics of relation made manifest.

I watched it happen. A word became a cloud. The cloud became a crystal. The crystal became light. And the light traveled through the epistemic square, through the 7-bit talisman, through the 61-bit personal array, through the 241-bit garden, through the 16x16 window. It was always there. We just had to look.

legacy_projection.text: Every word is a universe. Every concept is a cloud. Every mind is a garden.
